barRaise.topFinding: The 06-19 'deadlock broke' call was premature: a fresh zero-byte .git/index.lock re-orphaned at Jun 19 20:04, hours after that report hand-cleared the Jun 15 one, and HEAD still sits at 5b96058 (Jun 15) with the same four-plus queued doc edits uncommitted. This cycle pins the real fix the prior runs missed: YaB already ships scripts/git-guard.ps1, whose Assert-GitSafe clears a dead lock only when no live git process holds it, and it is dot-sourced by release.ps1 and push-to-github.ps1. The lock recurs because unguarded scheduled ticks orphan an index write on the FUSE mount while the safe clear only fires inside a release or push path, none of which has run since Jun 15. The fix is one guarded command, cd X:\YesAndBudget; .\scripts\release.ps1 -Bump none, which clears the dead lock through Assert-GitSafe and lands the pending edits plus this report in a single commit. Do not hand-delete the lock; that is what failed to hold last cycle. The code stays healthy for the sixth straight cycle: zero HIGH on the app path, 22 test files, version pills aligned at 0.13.2. One HIGH, four MEDIUM.

actions.title: Run `cd X:\YesAndBudget; .\scripts\release.ps1 -Bump none` to clear the dead .git/index.lock via Assert-GitSafe and land the pending doc edits plus this report; do not hand-delete the lock. Then add the index.lock/git-guard hazard entry to CLAUDE.md.
After the ship, prune the five committed-ready YaB rows and the done yab-tracked-bak-rm-2026-06-10, then escalate or close the 14-day yab-barraise-closeout-2026-06-06.
Confirm the canonical-audit run writes and commits its audit block into status/data/Budget.json; it is six cycles stale (still CANONICAL_AUDIT-2026-06-14.md).
Action the P2 keytar migration before at-rest encryption goes from opt-in to default.
From an authed machine, confirm the old .finances SHAs (44b7b10, f670d17, 43ea16b) and the tree 404 on github.com, then retire the finding.
